name: 104"x60" Tablecloth Black/White Weave - Threshold™
description:
Bring a welcoming look to your dining table with this Weave Tablecloth from Threshold™. This rectangular tablecloth is adorned with a subtle weave pattern in black and white for a lovely textured look, making it perfect for everyday dining or casual entertaining. Made with 100% cotton, this rectangular tablecloth helps protect the table surface from spills, and it can be machine washed for easy upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
